name: For Each
summary: Structural directive for rendering lists of items based on an array.

templateAttribute.description: Implemented as a CustomAttribute on <template> rather than CustomTemplateDirective
templateAttribute.rationale: Avoids Safari's restriction on the 'is' attribute for built-in element extensions. CustomAttribute registration via the attribute registry is more portable.

commentMarkers.description: Uses comment nodes to mark list boundaries instead of a wrapper element
commentMarkers.rationale: Preserves parent-child DOM relationships for CSS Grid/Flex. Comment markers are invisible to layout.

contextInjection.description: Each stamped item's root element gets an injector with customContexts:{alias} set
contextInjection.rationale: Standard injector chain resolution means {{@item.name}} works without special handling. Same pattern used by the router for route context.

phaseOneLimitation.description: Phase 1 renders once on connect; no reactive array watching
phaseOneLimitation.rationale: Covers the most common use case (render route-loaded data). Reactive updates will be added in Phase 2 with store subscription integration.

htmlTemplate.usage: A structural directive that repeats a `<template>` per array item, cloning its content fragment for each row.
